'''dhakumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iberis|iberis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iberis|iberis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhakumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhækimith|dhækimith]] || [[word:dhækimij|dhækimij]] || [[word:dhækimish|dhækimish]] || [[word:dhækimi|dhækimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakukumuth|dhakukumuth]] || [[word:dhakukumuj|dhakukumuj]] || [[word:dhakukumush|dhakukumush]] || [[word:dhakukumu|dhakukumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakumuth|dhakumuth]] || [[word:dhakumuj|dhakumuj]] || [[word:dhakumush|dhakumush]] || [[word:dhakumu|dhakumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakufmuth|dhakufmuth]] || [[word:dhakufmuj|dhakufmuj]] || [[word:dhakufmush|dhakufmush]] || [[word:dhakufmuf|dhakufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhakumuthu|dhakumuthu]] || [[word:dhakumuju|dhakumuju]] || [[word:dhakumushu|dhakumushu]] || [[word:dhakumuku|dhakumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhakumuth|dhakumuth]] || [[word:dhakumuj|dhakumuj]] || [[word:dhakumush|dhakumush]] || [[word:dhakumu|dhakumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhakumuthul|dhakumuthul]] || [[word:dhakumujul|dhakumujul]] || [[word:dhakumushul|dhakumushul]] || [[word:dhakumukul|dhakumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhakumuthuthu|dhakumuthuthu]] || [[word:dhakumujuju|dhakumujuju]] || [[word:dhakumushushu|dhakumushushu]] || [[word:dhakumuku|dhakumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhakumuthun|dhakumuthun]] || [[word:dhakumujun|dhakumujun]] || [[word:dhakumushun|dhakumushun]] || [[word:dhakumukun|dhakumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhakumuthuoro|dhakumuthuoro]] || [[word:dhakumujuoro|dhakumujuoro]] || [[word:dhakumushuoro|dhakumushuoro]] || [[word:dhakumukuoro|dhakumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
